name: Persta Resources Inc.
summary: Persta Resources Inc., an exploration and development company, engages in the exploration and development of natural gas and crude oil in Alberta, Canada. The company owns interests in the Alberta Foothills liquids-rich natural gas properties; the Peace River light oil properties in Dawson area; and Progress-Montney property located in the northern Alberta. As of December 31, 2019, it had 63,000 net acres of land in the Western Canadian Sedimentary Basin; 5,583 thousand barrels of oil equivalent (Mboe) of net proved reserves; and 8,007 Mboe of net proved plus probable reserves. Persta Resources Inc. was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
